episodes.title: Even More News: We All Know Tulsi Gabbard Is In A Cult, Right?
episodes.description: Hi. On today's episode, Katy, Cody, and Jonathan talk about the cult that's influenced Tulsi Gabbard's career, Republicans blaming Obama for the breakdown of respectful political discourse, and of course the #1 news story of the summer, the Reflecting Pool. PATREON: https://patreon.com/somemorenews MERCH: https://shop.somemorenews.com YOUTUBE MEMBERSHIP: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvlj0IzjSnNoduQF0l3VGng/join #tulsigabbard #Obama #EvenMoreNews Chapters: 00:00 - Introduction 1:12 - Iran Update 4:06 - Tulsi Gabbard's Cult Handlers 13:17 - Conservatives Decided Trump Is Obama's Fault 21:36 - The Reflecting Pool Saga See Privacy Policy at https://art19.com/privacy and California Privacy Notice at https://art19.com/privacy#do-not-sell-my-info .
